title: Concept Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <concepts_dir>/<id>/main.md file. Progress tracking lives here — there is no separate progress file.

id.description: Snake_case ID matching the folder name under concepts_dir and the entry in index.md

description.description: One-sentence plain-English summary of what this concept is

related_concepts.description: [[wikilink]] references to closely related concept IDs — prerequisites, follow-ons, or siblings

started_at.description: ISO date when the concept was first taught, null if not yet started

completed_at.description: ISO date when the learner confirmed understanding and status was set to Done, null otherwise

notes.description: True when this concept folder has been written and main.md exists

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes that have informed this concept

workflows.description: [[wikilink]] references to workflow nodes that list this concept as a prerequisite. Optional — populated when a workflow is created that gates on this concept.
